disputeNotes: Two independent WebFetch calls (separate requests, second call did not reference the first call's extracted values) agreed exactly on hourBranch, yinYangSexLabel, displayedMenhScore, displayedWholeChartTotal, lunar month and lunar day.

The first pass's summarized year stem-branch label ('Giáp Tuất') was almost certainly a WebFetch extraction error — Giáp Tuất years (1934/1994) are chronologically inconsistent with solar date 1997-02-01 falling in lunar year 1996 (whose correct stem-branch is Bính Tý, matching the search that produced this candidate in the first place). Year stem-branch is therefore recorded as null here rather than trusting either pass's text label; the exact numeric match (month/day/Mệnh/total) is the actual evidence for this recovery, not the text label.
Only hour Dần was captured in this session (this was a targeted V0.1 date-recovery check, not a full 12-hour panel pull) — the other 11 hours for this date are not yet captured.
